title: hieracium bifidum subsp. chalybaeum
intro: Hieracium bifidum subsp. chalybaeum, also known as the yellow hawkweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat digestive issues and promote wound healing due to its high content of flavonoids and sesquiterpenes. The health benefits of Hieracium bifidum subsp. chalybaeum include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce inflammation, protect against cell damage, and prevent infections. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal uses, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies to treat various health conditions.
